'''Rizzal''' was a [[Turazza]] who worked for [[Loh'khar]] the Finder. She was the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek's]] information gatherer.

==Biography==
The sister of [[Nizzal]] and [[Vizzal]], Rizzal's speciality was knowing who had information that was useful, and what they would want in exchange for it. She was also adept at breaking into computer systems to retrieve needed data. She joined the crew of the ''[[FarStar]]'' alongside her master and sisters.

==Personality and traits==
Because of her interest in computers, Rizzal would often be found observing people working at a computer, somehow managing to peer over their shoulder despite being small.

The quietest of the Turazza sisters, she often disappeared for long periods to sift through data or acquire new batches. She was tolerant of her sisters, despite Nizzal's bullying.
